message:
perf(agentdb): optimize compression 41% + add ADR-005 benchmarks

TemporalCompressor optimization:
- Replace Math.max(...spread) with direct loops (prevents stack overflow
  on large vectors and eliminates temporary array allocations)
- Pre-compute inverse range/scale constants
- Use pre-allocated arrays instead of Array.from().map()
- Result: 179ms -> 105ms for 1000x384d vectors

Performance benchmarks (6 tests):
- Compress 1000x384d: 105ms (0.105ms/vec)
- Decompress 1000x384d: 52ms (0.052ms/vec)
- Memory savings: half=68.5%, pq8=81.1%, pq4=90.2%, binary=97.4%
- Router: 68us/query (native @ruvector/router, 50 intents)
- E2E pipeline: 0.44ms/iteration (compress->route->project)

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
